zh.lifeSummary: 當Joanna Avery於1570年出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾比曉普斯 卡寧斯時，她的父親Edward Avery40歲，母親Margaret Stevens39歲。她於1586年與Robert Stephens在英國英格蘭維爾爾比曉普斯 卡寧斯結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1625年10月23日在英國英格蘭維爾爾享年55歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭維爾爾比曉普斯 卡寧斯。

nameMeanings.name: Avery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English and Anglo-Norman French personal name Aevery, a Norman form of Alfred . Among the 17th-century Puritan settlers in New England, there was some confusion with Averill . Compare Averett .
Altered form of French Canadian Hévey (see Hevey ). Compare Avey 3.

History: Christopher Avery emigrated from England to Salem, MA, in or before 1630. — William Avery (alias Averill) was one of the Puritan settlers who emigrated from England to Ipswich, MA, in or c. 1637. — Some of the American bearers of the surname Avery are descendants of Nicolas Hévé/Devé from France, who was in QC by 1672 (see Hevey ).

variants.name: Avara
meanings: Altered form of English   Avery  . See also   Avera  .
Italian (Sicily): from the feminine form of Avaro, a nickname from avaro ‘avaricious, mean, miserly’. This surname is very rare in Italy.

variants.name: Averill
meanings: English:

apparently from the name of the month (April), Middle English averil, Old French avrill, Latin aprīlis, perhaps with reference to freshness of temperament, or youth, or possibly to the changeable weather of the month.

perhaps occasionally a habitational name from Haverhill in Suffolk, with loss of initial H-. The placename derives from either Old English hæfera ‘oats’ or hæfer ‘he-goat’ + hyll ‘hill’. Compare Avery .

variants.name: Avera
meanings: Altered form of English   Avery  .

History: Richard Avery, from Fillongley, Warwickshire, is recorded in Surry, VA, in 1672. The surname was changed to Avera in the following generation and later also to Avara. A Jacob Avera is recorded in Johnson County, NC in 1764.

variants.name: Avary
meanings: English: variant of   Avery  .

variants.name: Every
meanings: English (southwestern): variant of   Avery  .

variants.name: Alfred
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Arianne, Armand, Camille, Germine, Jacques, Jean-Claude, Magalie, Marcel, Michel, Patrice.

English, French, German, West Indian (mainly Haiti), and African (mainly Tanzania): from the Middle English personal name Alfred, Elfred, Old English Ælfrǣd ‘elf counsel’. This owed its popularity as a personal name in England to the fame of the West Saxon king Alfred the Great (849–899), who defeated the Danes, keeping them out of Wessex, and whose court was a great center of learning and culture.

variants.name: Hevey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Nicolle.

French Canadian (Hévey): altered form of French Hévé, itself a variant or an altered form of Devé, an unflattering nickname from desvé ‘mad, insane’. The surname Devé originates from Normandy. Compare Avery 2 and Avey 3.
Irish (Meath): variant of   Heaphy  .

nameMeanings.name: Joanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form, Io(h)anna, of Greek Iōanna, the feminine equivalent of Iōannēs ( see John ). In the New Testament, this name is borne by a woman who was one of Jesus's followers (Luke 8:3; 24:10). She was the wife of the steward of the household of King Herod Antipas. The name was regularly used throughout the Middle Ages in most parts of Europe as a feminine equivalent of John , but in England it has only been in common use as a vernacular given name since the 19th century. Celebrated British bearers of the name include the novelist Joanna Trollope ( b. 1943 ), the actress Joanna Lumley ( b. 1946 ), and the concert pianist Joanna McGregor ( b. 1959 ).

Celebrated British bearers of the name include the novelist Joanna Trollope ( b. 1943 ), the actress Joanna Lumley ( b. 1946 ), and the concert pianist Joanna McGregor ( b. 1959 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Joanna Avery was born in 1570, in Bishops Cannings, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Edward Avery, was 40 and her mother, Margaret Stevens, was 39. She married Robert Stephens in 1586, in Bishops Cannings, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 23 October 1625, in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 55, and was buried in Bishops Cannings, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joanna Avery est née en 1570, à Bishops Cannings, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Edward Avery, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Margaret Stevens, avait 39 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Stephens en 1586, à Bishops Cannings, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 23 octobre 1625, à Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterrée à Bishops Cannings, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.Bishop's Cannings, Wiltshire, England, U: イギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアビショプ'ス カニングズ
ja.lifeSummary: Joanna Averyが1570年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアビショプス カニングズで生まれた時，父Edward Averyは40歳，母Margaret Stevensは39歳であった。1586年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアビショプス カニングズでRobert Stephensと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1625年10月23日にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアで55歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアビショプス カニングズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joanna Avery(이)가 1570년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 비숍스 캔잉스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edward Avery(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Stevens(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 1586년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 비숍스 캔잉스에서 Robert Stephens(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1625년 10월 23일 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 비숍스 캔잉스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joanna Avery nasceu em 1570, em Bishops Cannings, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Edward Avery, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Stevens, tinha 39 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Stephens em 1586, em Bishops Cannings, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 23 de outubro de 1625, em Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 55 anos, e foi sepultada em Bishops Cannings, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joanna Avery родилась в 1570 г. в местности бишопс каннингс, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Edward Avery было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Stevens, 39. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Stephens в 1586 г. в местности бишопс каннингс, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 23 октября 1625 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 55 лет и была похоронена в местности бишопс каннингс, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joanna Avery nació en 1570, en Bishops Cannings, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Edward Avery, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Margaret Stevens, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Robert Stephens en 1586, en Bishops Cannings, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 23 de octubre de 1625, en Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultada en Bishops Cannings, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
